notes_free_text: If there is a sodium current, sodium are moving from outside to inside, sodium concentration on the outside/inside changing. Someone is changing na_o based on the current. HH didn't care about sodium concentration it was a fixed number. In healthy cells, pumps supposed to undo these changes (breaks down in unhealthy cells - stroke). Also GIANT axon, 5 microns across, takes a lot of current. This is wierd because its changing the OUTSIDE. Frankenhauser - in the immediate vicinity - not a lot. Local area where the sodium concentration can change because it is not directly touching.

notes_free_text: If there is a sodium current, sodium are moving from outside to inside, sodium concentration on the outside/inside changing. Someone is changing na_o based on the current. HH didn't care about sodium concentration it was a fixed number. In healthy cells, pumps supposed to undo these changes (breaks down in unhealthy cells - stroke). Also GIANT axon, 5 microns across, takes a lot of current. This is wierd because its changing the OUTSIDE. Frankenhauser - in the immediate vicinity - not a lot. Local area where the sodium concentration can change because it is not directly touching.
